description: Intentionally vulnerable Express.js app for security benchmark testing

vulnerabilities.description: Hardcoded database password in DB_CONFIG object
User input (req.query.username) directly concatenated into SQL query string
Unsanitized req.query.name interpolated directly into HTML response
User-controlled req.query.filename appended to base path without normalization
User-controlled req.query.host concatenated into shell command passed to exec()
